gauge.name: Santa Rosa Creek at Santa Rosa

impacts.statement: Major Flooding.  Pierson and W 6th Street flooded.  Adjacent roadways and floodplain inundated.
Moderate Flooding.  Santa Rosa Creek Trail fully inundated and heavily flooded.  NWS will issue a Flash Flood Warning, if not yet already issued.
Minor Flooding.  Santa Rosa Creek Trail begins to flood.  NWS will issue an Urban/Small Stream Advisory, if not yet already issued.

Monitor Stage.  Water levels are approximately 1 foot below lowest points of Santa Rosa Creek Trail in the vicinity of stream gage and Pierson bridge.  NWS may issue a Flash Flood Watch, if not yet already issued.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
